---
title: "shap_decomposition"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{shap_decomposition}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r}
library(ineqTrees)
```

<!-- WARNING - This vignette is generated by {fusen} from dev/shap_decomposition.Rmd: do not edit by hand -->



<!--
 You need to run the 'description' chunk in the '0-dev_history.Rmd' file before continuing your code there.
-->





## SHAP helpers








# shap_conc_decomp


```{r example-shap_conc_decomp}
shap <- data.frame(
  education = c(1, 0, -1),
  water = c(0, 1, 1)
)
rank <- c(1, 2, 3)

res <- shap_conc_decomp(
  shap = shap,
  rank = rank,
  baseline = 2
)
res$diagnostics
res$contributions

dalex_like <- data.frame(
  "_id_" = rep(1:3, each = 3),
  "_vname_" = rep(c("_baseline_", "education", "water"), times = 3),
  "_attribution_" = c(2, 1, 0, 2, 0, 1, 2, -1, 1),
  check.names = FALSE
)

shap_conc_decomp(
  shap = dalex_like,
  rank = rank,
  baseline = 2,
  from_dalex = TRUE
)$contributions
```



# fractional_rank


```{r example-fractional_rank}
fractional_rank(c(10, 20, 20, 40))
fractional_rank(c(1, NA, 3), na_rm = TRUE)
```
